hooks.command: echo '{"additionalContext": "[HOOK REMINDER] You edited a file. Remember: (1) Update CODEBASE_MAP.md if you changed backend files (2) Run npm test before commit (3) Backend files = commit only, no deploy (4) META-RULE: did this edit expose a bug class not covered by an audit skill? If yes, add/extend one in .claude/skills/audit-*."}'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(backend|Backend|SaleTab|CloneTab|CustomerListTab|CustomerCard|CustomerDetailView|MasterDataTab|AppointmentTab|FinanceTab|DepositPanel|WalletPanel|MembershipPanel|PointsPanel|TreatmentFormPage|BackendDashboard)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Backend files should NOT be deployed via vercel --prod. Commit only." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

echo '{"additionalContext": "[META-RULE 2026-04-19 iron-clad, NEVER FORGET] ยิ่งทำงาน ยิ่งเรียนรู้ ยิ่งเก่งขึ้น. Every bug → add test + audit skill invariant. Every new pattern → document + make a skill. Every session leaves .claude/skills/** sharper. See .claude/rules/07-continuous-improvement.md + memory/feedback_continuous_improvement.md. [SESSION CONTEXT] Phase 8/12 DONE + audit clean. 1054 tests pass. 16 audit skills / 163 invariants. Rules: (1) Backend files = commit only, NO deploy (2) npm test ALL PASS before commit (3) Update CODEBASE_MAP.md after code changes (4) Thai culture: red color NOT on patient names (5) No IIFE in JSX (Vite OXC crash) (6) Firestore REST PATCH needs updateMask always (7) Thai time: use bangkokNow/thaiTodayISO from utils.js — NEVER new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) for display (8) Schedule-link resync must re-apply persisted filter via shouldBlockScheduleSlot."}'

echo '{"additionalContext": "[META-RULE] ยิ่งทำงาน ยิ่งเก่งขึ้น — if you fix a bug this turn, add/extend an audit skill invariant in .claude/skills/audit-*. If you introduce a pattern, document + skill-ify it. End-of-session: commit .claude/** alongside code. (.claude/rules/07-continuous-improvement.md)"}'
